name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
description: A potent 15% Vitamin C serum designed to neutralize free radicals, brighten the complexion, and diminish the appearance of dark spots. Enhanced with Ferulic Acid for stability and maximum antioxidant protection.
usageSteps: 1. Cleanse face thoroughly.
2. Apply 3-5 drops to face and neck.
3. Follow with moisturizer and SPF.

name: Hydrating Aloe Face Wash
description: A non-foaming, pH-balanced cleanser that removes impurities while soothing the skin barrier. Infused with pure Aloe Vera and Green Tea to prevent redness and maintain moisture levels.
usageSteps: 1. Wet face with lukewarm water.
2. Massage cleanser in circular motions.
3. Rinse and pat dry.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: A lightweight, reef-safe mineral sunscreen that provides broad-spectrum protection. It leaves a sheer finish without a white cast, making it ideal for daily wear under makeup.
usageSteps: 1. Apply liberally 15 minutes before sun exposure.
2. Reapply every 2 hours.
3. Reapply after swimming or sweating.

name: Charcoal Detox Face Mask
description: Deep-cleansing clay mask that uses activated charcoal to draw out bacteria, chemicals, and dirt from the skin. Kaolin clay helps absorb excess sebum and minimize the look of pores.
usageSteps: 1. Apply an even layer to clean skin.
2. Leave on for 10-15 minutes.
3. Rinse with warm water.

name: Matte Finish Liquid Foundation
description: A high-performance, full-coverage liquid foundation that provides a seamless matte finish for up to 24 hours. Formulated with oil-absorbing silica and nourishing Vitamin E to prevent oxidation and keep the skin looking fresh and shine-free.
usageSteps: 1. Shake the bottle well before use.
2. Apply a small amount to the back of your hand.
3. Blend onto the face using a foundation brush or damp sponge, starting from the center and moving outward.

name: Keratin Repair Shampoo
description: A high-performance shampoo enriched with hydrolyzed keratin and cold-pressed argan oil. It specifically targets weakened hair bonds to repair structural damage, eliminate frizz, and restore a brilliant, healthy shine to dull or over-processed hair.
usageSteps: 1. Apply a generous amount to wet hair.
2. Massage gently into the scalp and through the ends.
3. Rinse thoroughly and follow with conditioner.

name: Soft Matte Lipstick
description: A luxuriously creamy, highly pigmented matte lipstick that delivers intense color payoff in a single swipe. Formulated with conditioning agents to ensure a comfortable, non-drying wear that lasts all day without feathering.
usageSteps: 1. Exfoliate lips for a smooth base.
2. Apply lipstick starting from the center of the upper lip.
3. Work towards the outer edges and repeat for the bottom lip.

name: Under Eye Brightening Cream
description: A revitalizing eye cream formulated to target vascular and pigmented dark circles. Infused with caffeine to constrict blood vessels and peptides to stimulate collagen, it visibly reduces puffiness and firms the delicate eye area.
usageSteps: 1. Cleanse and dry the face.
2. Apply a pea-sized amount onto the ring finger.
3. Gently tap around the orbital bone until absorbed.

name: Sensibio H2O Micellar Water
description: A cult-favorite soothing micellar water that cleanses and removes makeup while respecting the skin's natural physiological balance. Formulated with a pH of 5.5, it is perfect for sensitive skin.
usageSteps: 1. Soak a cotton pad with Sensibio H2O.
2. Gently cleanse and/or remove makeup from your face and eyes.
3. Re-apply until the cotton pad becomes clean.
4. Lightly dab your face with a clean cotton towel.
